Game.Name: Planet's Champ TG 3000, The (Japan)
Game.plot: Top Gear 3000 is a Driving game, developed by Gremlin Interactive and published by Kemco,which was released in 1995.Cheat: Cheat CodesGo to the passwords screen and enter:Cheat: System PasswordsEnter these passwords at the password entry screen to go to the corrosponding system.Cheat: System PasswordsEnter the following passwords at the PASSWORD screen. All passwords start the game with 6 Million+ Credits/ALL car upgrades set at Level 6(max.)/ALL optional upgrades.
